title: Autorefresh in PowerBI
excerpt:
Has anyone get your dashboard autorefreshed in PowerBI using a gateway? I can refresh it on my desktop, but when I’m using online services it doesn’t work. 
I’m using the https://api.monday.com/v2 link as a conector, I’v…

posts.author: MariliaMaragno (Marilia Maragno)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone get your dashboard autorefreshed in PowerBI using a gateway? I can refresh it on my desktop, but when I’m using online services it doesn’t work.
I’m using the https://api.monday.com/v2 link as a conector, I’ve tried introducing the api token together, but it didn’t work either.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marilia, sorry for the late reply here. I am not a powerBI expert but we can put our heads together to solve this.

How do you auto-refresh other PowerBI reports? What’s different about the monday API that prevents it from being auto-refreshed in the first place?

posts.author: MariliaMaragno (Marilia Maragno)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @dipro , but I’ve already done it! I needed to use the relative path in powerquery to adjust the code.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
